title: Work and travel abroad with IEC - Canada.ca
content:
## Work and travel abroad with IEC
If you're a Canadian citizen aged 18 to 35, you have the opportunity to work and travel abroad through International Experience Canada (IEC). With over 35 countries to choose from, IEC is your path to a work permit or visa that allows you to work and explore.
But the first step is to find the country that best suits you.

## Find your perfect match

### Pick what's important to you
Find which country you'd love to work and travel in by selecting your preferences below.
Check your top three countries and territories that match your preferences most closely.

### Explore each country and territory
Learn more about what makes these places special, like local traditions and unique food.

## Your country shortlist
Seek out new experiences in Andorra
Seek out new experiences in Australia
Seek out new experiences in Austria
Explore all IEC options ▼

## By taking part in IEC, you can:
gain valuable international work experience while earning money
develop life skills that can also improve your résumé and job prospects
grow personally and professionally while working on your soft skills
develop lifelong connections while working and travelling
experience a different part of the world and learn more about other cultures
develop and improve new language skills
Learn more about IEC
In order to maximize the functionality of this page, please turn on Javascript.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
